## Highlights

- **D23 — Triage scoring (value × complexity).** `/ginee-triage` now ranks ready work by **score = `value` / `complexity`** (default WSJF cost-of-delay over job-size) instead of age. ATAM utility-tree H/M/L on both axes (`H=3, M=2, L=1`).
- **Two new label namespaces** — `value:high|medium|low` + `complexity:high|medium|low`. Reporter sets `value` at file-time (never auto-guessed); `solution-architect` auto-estimates `complexity` on pickup when missing.
- **TODO equivalent** — inline marker `☐ [v:H c:L] Description` (case-insensitive). Partial markers handled; missing = unscored (sorts last).
- **Sticky `<!-- ginee:score v=1 -->` comment** per issue, updated in place on every ginee-driven label change. Plus immutable audit comments on key events.
- **`@team-lead recompute score #<N>`** — re-reads current labels (catches manual `gh issue edit` between sessions) and refreshes the sticky.
- **Adopter override** — `local/framework.config.yaml § triage.scoring-formula` accepts `value-over-complexity` (default) / `value-only` / `value-minus-complexity`.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.5.1...v0.6.0
